evidence.lint_output_path: terminal://cd scripts/curation && ruff check pipeline/dedup/llm_arbitrator.py tests/test_qual_002.py

summary: Implemented QUAL-002 end-to-end with TDD: added LLMArbitrator (queue ingestion, Haiku arbitration prompt/parse, YES merge + Convex addRouteMatch write, UNCERTAIN error queue routing, per-batch JSONL cost ledger, source-priority winner selection, reconciliation log append, and CLI main) plus a new pytest suite covering all five acceptance criteria with mocked Anthropic and mocked Convex HTTP. Local task validations pass for the changed Python files, but commit is blocked by pre-existing repository pre-commit TypeScript hook failures unrelated to this task (missing/generated Convex TS artifacts and broad existing TS errors outside write-allowed scope).

notebook_entries.action: Wrote failing QUAL-002 tests first, then implemented llm_arbitrator.py to satisfy AC-1 through AC-5.
notebook_entries.outcome: All new QUAL-002 tests pass (5/5), ruff passes for changed files, and scoped mypy check passes with explicit-package-bases/follow-imports-skip.
notebook_entries.learning: The repository pre-commit hook enforces global TypeScript checks that currently fail due pre-existing Convex generated-module/typecheck issues outside this Python task’s write-allowed scope, which prevents creating a commit despite task-level completion.
